Descriptions:
  Below are the pipelines which are set as runIfOnlySpecified

Pipelines:
  source                          Manage source directory
  run (default)                   Execute pipeline found from sources

Usage:
  dotnet fsi your_script.fsx -- -h
  dotnet fsi your_script.fsx -- -p your_pipeline [options]

Options:
  -h, --help                      Show help and usage information
